items.title: Bootstrap repo & compose
items.acceptance: Repo scaffold exists; docker compose up works; health endpoint returns 200

items.title: Runtime status command (`scripts/status.py` + `make status`)
items.acceptance: Prints git hash, python version, env mode, docker compose health, DB connection, latest migration, paused flag, and latest smoke output timestamps/paths

items.title: Typed config loader
items.acceptance: Pydantic settings loaded; .env validated at startup; missing vars fail startup

items.title: Postgres + migrations
items.acceptance: Tables trades/opportunities/pnl_daily/alerts exist; migrations run idempotently; migration command documented

items.title: Telemetry baseline
items.acceptance: Prometheus metrics exposed; Grafana shows sample dashboard; scrape target passes health check

items.title: GAP-1: mempool-producer wiring
items.acceptance: `mempool-producer` must run WS publisher path, not consumer module

items.title: GAP-2: WS->Redis publisher runtime path
items.acceptance: Compose stack starts; Redis stream grows over time; latest stream entries are readable

items.title: GAP-3: consumer RPC env mismatch
items.acceptance: Consumer accepts `RPC_HTTP` fallback from `RPC_ENDPOINT_PRIMARY`; consumer fetch success appears in logs

items.title: Mempool monitor (multi-WS)
items.acceptance: >=100 pending tx/min on Polygon test; unit tests cover reconnect/race; graceful backoff on WS errors

items.title: WS->Redis publisher path + consumer handoff wiring
items.acceptance: Producer runs real WS publisher (`ws_to_redis`); stream entries are fresh and growing; entries contain `hash/tx/ts/ts_ms`; consumer group is attached with non-error lag

items.title: Permit2 handler
items.acceptance: Off-chain signature generation works; nonce management persisted; unit tests cover domain/expiry

items.title: Exact-output swap
items.acceptance: Calldata builds; simulation passes; revert caught; slippage <= config

items.title: Private orderflow router
items.acceptance: Routes by tx traits; retry+fallback implemented; relay success metric recorded

items.title: Stealth triggers
items.acceptance: Flags driven by config; threshold unit tests pass; toggles reflected in logs

items.title: Stealth E2E
items.acceptance: >=10 trades via private path; zero sandwiched in test env; runbook updated

items.title: Sniper/sandwich detectors
items.acceptance: Heuristics pass fixtures; precision/recall logged; false-positive rate reported

items.title: Backrun calculator
items.acceptance: Profitable path computed; simulation > 0 profit; output includes gas + tip

items.title: Bundle builder
items.acceptance: Atomic bundle built; replay protection in place; retry policy enforced

items.title: Builder submissions
items.acceptance: Submits to builder pool; success ratio metric emitted; exponential backoff on errors

items.title: Hunter E2E
items.acceptance: >=5 successful backruns in fork/testnet; positive P&L; artifacts saved

items.title: Strategy orchestrator
items.acceptance: Rule-based switch (stealth/hunter/hybrid) works; state visible in telemetry; manual override documented

items.title: AdaptiveRiskManager
items.acceptance: Kelly with safety factor applied; hard caps enforced; unit tests for edge cases

items.title: Kill-switch & API
items.acceptance: /pause and /resume endpoints live; persisted flag survives restart; E2E verified

items.title: Gas policy module
items.acceptance: Dynamic gas ceiling applied; alerts on exceed; metric exported

items.title: Alerting
items.acceptance: Discord embeds on thresholds; test fixtures pass; throttle prevents spam

items.title: Grafana dashboards
items.acceptance: Panels for P&L, win-rate, gas %, relay success, latency; JSON provisioning works

items.title: Nightly ETL -> DuckDB
items.acceptance: ETL job persists data; weekly report script outputs JSON; job exit code monitored

items.title: Weekly analytics report
items.acceptance: Summary + recommendations saved to DB; report posted to Discord; run logged

items.title: Secrets hardening
items.acceptance: Docker secrets/age vault used; no plaintext keys in env/logs; secret scan passes

items.title: Access control
items.acceptance: IP allowlist + API key + rate limit enforced; 403 on breach; logs include requester

items.title: Audit logging
items.acceptance: Append-only audit captures decisions; includes mode/reason; tamper check passes

items.title: Pre-submit simulation
items.acceptance: Every tx simulated pre-submit; failures block submit; metrics logged
